case=ols_bca_topic_synthetic
command=ols_bca_topic
depvar=y
covars=q1 q2
options=wmatrix(W) smatrix(S) bmatrix(B) k(0.5)
tol_coef=1e-08
tol_vcov=1e-07
n=300
k=6
r=3
c=5
v=8
q=2
kval=0.5
vmli_version=1.4.0
note=Additive topic-model correction; small synthetic recipe (n=300, r=3, c=5, v=8, q=2); k=0.5.
